*
* HA5022 Macro Model
* Rev. 7/17/96
*
* Subcircuit Call Order: +IN -IN Vcc Vee Out Enable
*
* (Note:This subciruit models only 1 amplifier of the package, so the Icc is
* set to 1/2 the total HA5022 Icc)
*
.SUBCKT HA5022 101 111 113 114 112 110  
LAO 115 112 250N  
RAO 115 112 125  
CAO 112 0 4P  
LAI 116 111 40N  
RAI 116 111 200  
CAI 116 111 3P  
CPI 111 0 1.5P  
CPF 112 111 2.5P  
.MODEL QIP PNP IS=1.0E-16 BF=130 NF=2.2 
.MODEL QIM NPN IS=1.0E-16 BF=220 NF=2.5 
.MODEL QOP NPN IS=1.0E-16 BF=180 NF=2.2 
.MODEL QOM PNP IS=1.1E-16 BF=50 NF=2.5 
ROP 113 117 +3.50000000E+02  
QOP 117 118 119 QOP  
CIP2 120 118 +2.73661972E-13  
CIP 113 118 +6.70000000E-13  
DIP 118 113 DLIM  
GIP 113 118 121 0 +3.35000000E-04  
DIPL 114 118 DLIM  
QIP 114 120 118 QIP  
RIN 101 120 280  
CIN2 101 0 .03P  
RIG 101 0 +2.60000000E+07  
CIN 120 0 .5PF  
QIM 113 120 122 QIM  
GIM 122 114 121 0 +3.35000000E-04  
DIML 122 113 DLIM  
DIM 114 122 DLIM  
CIM 122 114 +6.29914530E-13  
CIM2 120 122 +3.24501425E-13  
QOM 123 122 119 QOM  
ROM 123 114 +3.50000000E+02  
.MODEL DLIM2 D N=.01 IS=1E-10 
RE1 110 124 15K  
RE2 124 113 15K  
DEN 124 113 DEN  
.MODEL DEN D  BV=+5.26 IBV=1.0E-10 
VMI 102 108 +0.00000000E+00

+-1.88100000E-06

 .MODEL DLIMVO D N=.01 IS=1E-20

.MODEL DLIM D N=.01 IS=1E-20
